title: Idempotency / dedup for session episodes via Claude Code session id
userStory: As an operator, I want hook re-fires to update the existing node so that crash + restart does not produce duplicate Session episodes.
acceptanceCriteria: Hook includes the Claude Code session id in the episode name
Re-fire with same session id updates the existing episode rather than creating a new one (relying on Graphiti name-based dedup or explicit replace API)
Verify: simulate a re-fire; only one Session episode exists for that session id
